concepts.title: Functor-of-points viewpoint
concepts.blurb: A space is studied through all maps into it, turning geometry into a representable functor problem.

concepts.title: Representability and moduli functors
concepts.blurb: Representable functors correspond to genuine geometric objects.

concepts.title: When functors require stacks
concepts.blurb: Automorphisms obstruct representability by schemes and motivate stack language.
